category_sources: source_facts.description identifies chrome-cli as a command-line controller for Google Chrome.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides the canonical CLI name chrome-cli.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an upstream repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes command-line control of Google Chrome; source_facts.executables lists browser-specific CLI wrappers.
